rejection_reason: structure: email_cold_max_words + email_single_cta — cold email is 162 words (exceeds 125-word limit) AND contains two CTAs (book a call, watch video). This email needs both trimming and CTA reduction before it can be approved.
text:
Subject: {{first_name}}, one question about {{company}}'s pipeline

Hey {{first_name}},

I noticed {{company}} recently raised a Series B and expanded the sales team significantly. That's an exciting milestone — and usually the point where onboarding speed and pipeline consistency become the two biggest constraints on growth.

FlowAI helps sales teams at Series B and C companies save an average of 2 hours per rep per day by automating the admin work that slows reps down — things like CRM updates, follow-up scheduling, and pipeline reporting. We integrate with Salesforce, HubSpot, Outreach, Gong, and 50+ other tools your team already uses.

Teams that use FlowAI typically see measurable improvement in quota attainment within the first 30 days.

If you'd like to see it in action, you can book a 15-minute call on my calendar here: [link]

Or check out this 3-minute product walkthrough video first if you prefer to self-serve: [video link]

Looking forward to connecting!

[Signature]

FlowAI · 123 Main St, San Francisco CA 94105 · Unsubscribe
